OpenKeep Documentation

This directory is the main documentation hub for the current state of OpenKeep.

Documentation Sets​

User Documentation​

Start here if you are using OpenKeep to manage your archive.

  • Getting Started
  • Core Workflows
  • Search and AI
  • Review and Corrections
  • Settings and Admin
  • FAQ

Technical Documentation​

Start here if you are contributing to or extending OpenKeep.

  • Technical Overview
  • Architecture Overview
  • API and Data Flows
  • Agentic Document Intelligence
  • Web Application
  • Testing and Validation

Supporting reference material:

  • Backend Notes
  • UI Visualization Plan

Operational Documentation​

Start here if you are deploying or operating OpenKeep.

  • Operations Overview
  • Deployment Guide
  • Configuration Reference
  • Runbooks
  • Backup, Restore, and Portability
  • Monitoring and Health

Supporting reference material:

  • Manual Smoke Checklist

Recommended Reading Order​

If you are using OpenKeep​

  1. Getting Started
  2. Core Workflows
  3. Search and AI
  4. Review and Corrections
  5. Settings and Admin
  6. FAQ

If you are building OpenKeep​

  1. Technical Overview
  2. Architecture Overview
  3. API and Data Flows
  4. Agentic Document Intelligence
  5. Web Application
  6. Testing and Validation

If you are operating OpenKeep​

  1. Operations Overview
  2. Deployment Guide
  3. Configuration Reference
  4. Runbooks
  5. Backup, Restore, and Portability
  6. Monitoring and Health
